summary: Plan-only PR inventory review. No GitHub mutations are permitted by this job. None of the PRs has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation; #85616 is routed to central security handling per validator classification, and two waiting-on-author PRs need maintainer/author follow-up.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-ready PR, but not mergeable through Clownfish without complete merge preflight.
Security-sensitive PR must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; no ProjectClownfish mutation is planned.
Independent PR with a small useful diff, but failing checks block merge until the PR-specific failure is repaired or rerun with evidence.
Waiting-on-author PR with failing/cancelled checks requires maintainer or author follow-up before Clownfish can recommend merge or repair.
Waiting-on-author PR with a failing check requires maintainer or author follow-up before Clownfish can recommend merge or repair.
